text:
SELECT 
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS SAMPLE_TIME,
	A.MON$ATTACHMENT_ID AS SESSION_ID,
    A.MON$USER AS USERNAME,
    A.MON$REMOTE_ADDRESS AS IP_ADDRESS,
    A.MON$REMOTE_PROCESS AS APP_NAME,
    S.MON$SQL_TEXT AS CURRENT_QUERY,
    CASE S.MON$STATE 
        WHEN 0 THEN 'IDLE'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'ACTIVE'
        ELSE 'OTHER' 
    END AS STATUS,
    S.MON$TIMESTAMP AS QUERY_START_TIME,
    -- Calculate duration in seconds (Works in FB 3.0+)
    DATEDIFF(SECOND, S.MON$TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS DURATION_SECONDS
FROM 
    MON$ATTACHMENTS A
JOIN 
    MON$STATEMENTS S ON A.MON$ATTACHMENT_ID = S.MON$ATTACHMENT_ID
WHERE 
    S.MON$STATE = 1 -- Filter only currently executing (Active) queries
ORDER BY 
    S.MON$TIMESTAMP ASC
description: Firebird Active Session History (via MON$ tables)
name: Firebird ASH
